title: Iran Open Data — "Half of Iranian Households Don't Own a Car, Stats Show" (article, Dec 2022)
license_terms: Iran Open Data editorial article; free-preview portion only (site paywalls remainder). Underlying primary data credited by article to Statistical Centre of Iran (SCI) 2020 Household Income/Expenditure Report and Iranian Police vehicle registration data.
notes: Hand-written markdown note transcribing the free-preview portion of the IOD article verbatim (article cuts off mid-paragraph at IOD's subscription paywall: 'Examining household income …'). All figures traced to SCI as the primary source per the article's own attribution. No data fabricated beyond what is quoted on the page.
